pi_items.source: Verified against the task description which explicitly instructs to export the XML to this path.

Verified by reading the synthetic sample project generator (create_sample_project.py) which creates tasks with names "Security Audit" (UID 11) and "Production Deployment" (UID 15). The expected_fixed_cost values (3500.0 and 15000.0) are explicitly requested in the task description. The tolerance values are verification parameters.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on a synthetic project file. It is verified that the target tasks exist in the source data: 'Security Audit' corresponds to UID 11, and 'Production Deployment' corresponds to UID 15. The task instructions accurately instruct the agent to change the fixed costs to $3500 and $15000 respectively, and export the file to '/home/ga/Projects/updated_project_with_costs.xml'.
